user.title: Céleste – Add a celestial object
user.description: Choose a predefined planet, or select 'Custom object' to enter an asteroid, comet, or natural satellite.

custom.title: Céleste – Custom object
custom.description: Enter the exact object name as recognized by IMCCE (e.g., Ceres, Halley, Io). The name will be validated against the API.

location.title: Céleste – Observer location
location.description: Enter your observation coordinates. Defaults to your Home Assistant location.

error.object_not_found: Object not found by the IMCCE API. Please check the name and type.

abort.already_configured: This celestial object is already configured.
